series_metadata.series_title: Daily Meter Exceptions reports (Excel) by Video Lottery Sales Agent (Racino)
series_metadata.series_description: File contains daily meter exceptions and adjustments document sent from vendor daily, one per track, sent to remote server.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Maintain digital copy in the old system for two (2) years after June 30, 2025, then delete on June 30, 2027., Electronic: Delete
